installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

apt-get update > /dev/null 2>&1

# Download DaemonMC start.sh
wget -q -O start.sh https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DaemonMC-Plugin-House/DaemonMC-Egg/main/start.sh
